title: SushiSwap - Open App
meta_description: sushiswap users can open Sushi's official swap app for token trades, route comparison, wallet-confirmed execution, and DeFi liquidity.
hero_h2: Swap tokens through a multi-chain DeFi router
hero_lead: SushiSwap connects self-custody wallets to Sushi's aggregator and AMM so users can compare routes and swap tokens across supported networks from the official app.
what_is: SushiSwap is Sushi's decentralized exchange and DeFi app for token swaps, AMM liquidity pools, and aggregator routing. The official Sushi docs describe the protocol as a DeFi platform built around an AMM, aggregator, SUSHI governance, and related products.

how.d: Use the official sushi.com app route before connecting a wallet or approving any token.
Select the wallet and network you want to use, then confirm you are on the intended chain.
Enter the token you want to swap from and the token you want to receive, then review the quote.
Check token addresses, route, slippage, gas, and output before confirming in your wallet.

points.p: Sushi's router can compare available liquidity across decentralized exchanges, a product area covered in the official Sushi docs.
The AMM uses liquidity pools instead of an order book, allowing token swaps through on-chain pool contracts.
You connect a wallet and sign transactions yourself; ethereum.org's DeFi overview explains the broader model.

faq.a: The official Sushi web app is listed in the official resources and routes on www.sushi.com; verify that domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: What does sushiswap let me swap?
faq.a: It supports token swaps on supported networks through Sushi's app; availability depends on wallet network, token liquidity, and current routing.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for sushiswap?
faq.a: Yes. Swaps are wallet-confirmed transactions, so review token addresses, approvals, network, gas, and quoted output before signing.
No. The app is designed for self-custody wallet use; smart contract and token risks still apply, so verify each transaction.

faq.q: Can sushiswap guarantee the best price?
faq.a: No. Aggregator routing can compare available liquidity, but execution can change with liquidity, slippage, gas, and market movement.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify www.sushi.com before connecting a wallet; educational content, not financial advice.
